title: Meet the Quantum Kid
description: Nine-year-old Kai Moskvitch's podcast explores how quantum technologies can transform our daily lives.

title: Runway CEO says AI could help Hollywood make 50 films instead of one $100M blockbuster
description: Runway’s CEO says AI could help studios make dozens of films for the cost of one, betting volume will boost hit-making odds.

title: Anthropic Plots Major London Expansion
description: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person head count in London.

title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage
description: Starting April 19, the price of the Meta Quest 3S (128GB) and Meta Quest 3S (256GB) will go up by $50 to $349.99 and $449.99, respectively. The price of the Meta Quest 3 is going up by $100 to $599.99.

title: Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
description: The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.

title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
description: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. title: Treating enterprise AI as an operating layer
description: There’s a fault line running through enterprise AI, and it’s not the one getting the most attention. title: This simulation startup wants to be the Cursor for physical AI
description: Antioch raised a $8.5 million seed round to create simulation tools for a new generation of robot builders.

title: The Download: cyberscammers’ banking bypasses, and carbon removal troubles

title: Why having “humans in the loop” in an AI war is an illusion
description: The availability of artificial intelligence for use in warfare is at the center of a legal battle between Anthropic and the Pentagon. title: The race to Shackleton Crater is on—will Jeff Bezos or China get there first?
description: US and Chinese landers could be operating in close proximity on the Moon later this year.

title: This Beanie Is Designed to Read Your Thoughts
description: California-based startup Sabi is developing a thought-to-text wearable that could usher in the cyborg future.

title: The noise we make is hurting animals. Can we learn to shut up?
description: When the covid-19 pandemic started, Jennifer Phillips thought about the songs of the sparrows. They were easier to hear, because the world had suddenly become quieter. title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
description: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams

title: Florida surgeon charged with killing man after removing liver instead of spleen
description: It wasn't the first time the surgeon cut out the wrong organ.

title: Jury finds Live Nation/Ticketmaster is illegal monopoly that overcharged fans
description: Trump administration dropped out of the trial, but 33 states kept fighting.

title: "TotalRecall Reloaded" tool finds a side entrance to Windows 11's Recall database
description: "The vault is solid. The delivery truck is not."

title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
description: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

title: Allbirds Is Pivoting to AI Compute. Sure, Why Not
description: Once a $4 billion apparel juggernaut, Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI, a “GPU-as-a-Service” company. Hey, if you can't beat ’em, join ’em.

title: AI Slop Is Making the Internet Fake-Happy
description: A new study examines the impact of the rise of AI-generated websites on the internet—and found some surprising results.

title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
